'''Xad''' was a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] who was a minor aristocrat. On a quest of sorts to see [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] wonders, the Falleen was on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] known as [[StarForge Station]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he applied for a position on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'' when it docked at the station.

==Biography==
A [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]], Xad was a minor aristocrat who was curious about [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and went out on a quest to see its wonders.<ref name="Orbit" /> In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{FarOrbitDate}}</ref> at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Xad was on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[StarForge Station]], located in the [[StarForge Nebula/Legends|StarForge Nebula]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'' docked at the station, and Xad applied for a berth on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in response to a call for new crew members to crew the vessel; the ''Far Orbit'' was a new [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] vessel for the Alliance after some of its crew had [[Mutiny on the Far Orbit|mutinied]] out from under Imperial control.<ref name="Orbit" />

==Personality and traits==
Unlike most of his species, Xad was curious about the galaxy; that curiosity also led him into multiple fights and scrapes. Xad was a cold-[[Heart/Legends|hearted]], natural predator, and he possessed a sharp mind and wit. The Falleen also had many qualities that [[Human/Legends|Humans]] found noble. As a Falleen, Xad could use [[Pheromone/Legends|pheromones]] to his advantage, and he could breathe [[Water/Legends|underwater]] for up to twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]].<ref name="Orbit" />

==Equipment==
At some point in time, he wore a [[Clothing/Legends|shirt]] with a ruff around his neck and carried a [[Sword/Legends|sword]]. The Falleen also owned a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Deck Sweeper Stunning Blaster|Deck Sweeper stun blaster]].<ref name="Orbit" />

==Behind the scenes==
Xad first appeared in ''[[Preparing for War]]'', an adventure idea from [[1998]]'s ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'', by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and was a sequel of sorts to the previous publication, ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', carrying on that book's theme by following the privateering vessel ''Far Orbit''. The Falleen was provided as a sample character of the individuals who could apply for berths on the ship. It is up to player discretion as to who earns a job.<ref name="Orbit" />
